posts.caption: If peace had a view, this would be it 😲 What do you think? #explorepage #therapy
posts.description: Austrian landscape reel posted just 10 hours ago — serene mountain lake view
posts.description_zh: 奥地利绝美湖景，刚发10小时，'如果宁静有风景'
posts.highlight: serene Austrian mountain lake reflection, soft morning mist
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier sitting serenely at the edge of a glassy alpine lake in Austria, snow-capped mountains perfectly reflected in the still turquoise water, soft morning mist rising from the surface, golden sunrise light, dreamy peaceful atmosphere, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: If peace had a view, this would be it 😲 What do you think? #explorepage #therapy
posts.caption_zh: 如果宁静有一幅风景，一定就是这个样子😲 你觉得呢？

posts.caption: Can you feel it? 😍 #quotes
posts.description: Germany nature reel with immersive 'can you feel it' vibes — lush greenery
posts.description_zh: 德国自然风光，沉浸感十足，问卷式互动文案
posts.highlight: lush German forest or meadow, golden light, immersive feel
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier running joyfully through a lush German forest meadow bathed in golden afternoon light filtering through tall trees, vibrant green grass and wildflowers, magical woodland atmosphere, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.

posts.caption: This boat ride will destroy all your future boat ride views 🫣 Patagonia | Mountains | Fjord
posts.description: Patagonia boat ride through Torres Del Paine — dramatic fjord mountain scenery
posts.description_zh: 巴塔哥尼亚游船峡湾，托雷斯峰，震撼山景
posts.highlight: dramatic Patagonia fjord, turquoise water, jagged peaks
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier standing at the bow of a small boat sailing through a dramatic Patagonia fjord, towering granite peaks of Torres del Paine rising above turquoise glacial water, adventure spirit, cinematic wide-angle mood, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: This boat ride will destroy all your future boat ride views 🫣 Patagonia | Mountains | Explore | Fjord | Travel
posts.caption_zh: 这次游船会毁掉你对以后所有船旅的期待🫣 巴塔哥尼亚 | 山峦 | 探险 | 峡湾 | 旅行

posts.caption: Morning by the lake or mountains? 🤔 what do you prefer? Sunrise | Travel | Drone | DJI | Summer
posts.description: Aerial drone sunrise over lake — engagement question sparks comments
posts.description_zh: 无人机航拍湖景日出，你更喜欢湖边还是山间的清晨？
posts.highlight: golden sunrise lake reflection, aerial perspective, summer
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier sitting on a wooden dock over a perfectly still summer lake at sunrise, warm golden light spreading across glassy water, reflection of pine-covered mountains, peaceful summer morning, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: Morning by the lake or mountains? 🤔 what do you prefer? Sunrise | Travel | Drone | DJI | Summer
posts.caption_zh: 清晨在湖边还是山间？🤔 你更喜欢哪个？日出 | 旅行 | 无人机 | DJI | 夏天

posts.caption: This ball seriously NEVER gets old 😂🐶🎾 No matter how long they play, they still come back for more
posts.description: Bichon Frise obsessively plays a spring-mounted tennis ball that bounces back endlessly
posts.description_zh: 卷毛狗疯狂迷上弹力弹簧球玩具，停不下来，太治愈了
posts.highlight: endless bouncing ball toy, pure looping joy
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier excitedly launching itself at a spring-mounted tennis ball toy, caught mid-leap with mouth wide open and ears flying, eyes sparkling with pure joy, playful indoor pet photography, warm light, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: This ball seriously NEVER gets old 😂🐶🎾 No matter how long they play, they still come back for more — jumping, biting, spinning around like it's the greatest thing ever 😭🐾 Honestly, watching a dog this happy is pure therapy 💛 Would your pup ever get tired of this? 👀
posts.caption_zh: 这个球真的永远玩不腻😂🐶🎾 不管玩多久，还是会一次次扑上去——跳起来、咬住、转圈，好像这是世界上最美妙的东西😭🐾 说真的，看到狗狗这么开心，真的太治愈了💛 你家的狗会玩腻吗？👀

posts.caption: 親戚の集まりに行ってきました！ #dog #family #pomeranian
posts.description: Pomeranian at a family gathering — captioned about getting an unexpected nickname from relatives
posts.description_zh: 博美犬参加家庭聚会，被亲戚叫了个外号，主人哭笑不得
posts.highlight: fluffy dog at family reunion, heartwarming caption
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier sitting happily in the center of a warm family gathering in a cozy Japanese-style home, surrounded by cheerful family members of all ages, festive domestic atmosphere, soft indoor light, heartwarming scene, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: Went to a family gathering! It was so much fun. Everyone was looking at Lovkin and I ended up being called 'heatwave' by my relatives. All I could manage to say was 'I don't have a towel right now!!' I really need to work on my reactions.
posts.caption_zh: 去参加亲戚聚会了！玩得超开心。大家都在看Lovkin，结果被亲戚叫了个'热浪'的外号，一时懵住只回了一句'我现在没带毛巾啊！！'反应力真的太差了，得好好改改。

posts.caption: June has been a busy one! Having recently wrapped up a 10-day workshop in Vietnam, now midway through Bali
posts.description: Travel photographer posting from Bali during a 9-day photography workshop — lush tropical scenes
posts.description_zh: 旅拍摄影师在巴厘岛带工作坊，热带雨林光影氛围
posts.highlight: tropical Bali greenery, golden hour photography, workshop vibe
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier trotting along a narrow terraced rice paddy pathway in Bali at golden hour, lush emerald terraces cascading down misty hillsides, warm tropical light casting long shadows, travel photography mood, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: June has been a busy one! Having recently wrapped up a 10-day workshop in Vietnam earlier this month, I'm now midway through a 9-day workshop here in Bali. It's always a privilege to share these places with fellow photographers.
posts.caption_zh: 六月真的好忙！刚结束越南十天摄影工作坊，现在又在巴厘岛的九天工作坊进行中。能和摄影师同伴一起探索这些地方，真是莫大的荣幸。

posts.caption: Since 2018, my Sony camera has been more than just gear — it has been my passport to the world
posts.description: Cinematic Europe landscape reel — Sony partnership, sweeping mountain vistas
posts.description_zh: 索尼合作欧洲风光大片，山峦与云海，电影质感
posts.highlight: sweeping European alpine scenery, cinematic mood
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier standing on a snowy hilltop in Norway, the Northern Lights glowing vivid green and purple across the dark arctic sky, vast dark mountain landscape stretching into the distance, long-exposure photography mood, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_en: Since 2018, my Sony camera has been more than just gear — it has been my passport to the world. I've chased the Northern Lights across Norway, walked through rain-soaked forests in Nicaragua, stood in Saudi Arabia's endless deserts, and explored Europe's most vibrant autumn scenery.
posts.caption_zh: 自2018年以来，相机不仅仅是器材——它更是我探索世界的通行证。追逐挪威极光、漫步尼加拉瓜雨林、站在沙特无垠沙漠、探索欧洲最绚烂的秋色……每段旅程都是全新的世界。

posts.caption: Haloooo~ #ruraldog #puppy #dog #cute
posts.description: Rural puppy greeting the camera with big curious eyes in a countryside setting
posts.description_zh: 乡村小狗对着镜头打招呼，眼神灵动
posts.highlight: curious puppy greeting, rustic outdoor backdrop
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier peeking cheerfully over a rustic wooden fence in a lush green countryside field, soft dewy morning light, wildflowers in the background, bright curious eyes and perked-up ears, pastoral rural charm, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.caption_zh: 你好哇～ #乡村狗狗 #小奶狗 #狗狗 #可爱

posts.caption: 우비 딸기 🐥
posts.description: Korean Bichon Frise dressed in an adorable strawberry-themed raincoat — 53k likes
posts.description_zh: 韩系比熊穿草莓雨衣，5万赞，造型可爱到爆炸
posts.highlight: dog in strawberry raincoat costume, clean studio background
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier wearing an adorable bright red strawberry-patterned raincoat with a matching hood, sitting on wet pavement in a gentle rain shower, clean light background, Japanese pet photography aesthetic, pure white fluffy fur peeking out from the coat, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
